summary: Hardened modules/home/email/mbsync.nix: added negative dotted-name Patterns ("!Labels/*.*", "!Folders/*.*") to the logos-labels and logos-folders channels so no dotted mailbox name can reach the Maildir++ store, and added a new Group logos-full covering the five core channels plus logos-labels and logos-folders for explicit on-demand full sync. home-manager build --flake .#benjamin evaluated cleanly and the rendered .mbsyncrc store output was inspected to confirm both patterns and the new group render correctly. The runtime ~/.mbsyncrc symlink was never touched.
blockers: Live mbsync verification suite (mbsync logos-inbox, mbsync logos, mbsync -a, mbsync logos-full) requires home-manager switch and a running Proton Bridge session on the user's machine; deferred to the user per explicit task instructions (agent must not run home-manager switch).

artifacts.summary: Added "!Labels/*.*" / "!Folders/*.*" negative Patterns to logos-labels and logos-folders channels; added Group logos-full block
